function.name: readLocalPurchaseOrder
function.description: PROTOCOL ALPHA: Use this first to check 'PO_April20.csv' for customer orders whenever new stock arrives.

filePath.description: The name of the CSV file, usually 'PO_April20.csv'.

function.name: getProductAnalysis
function.description: Retrieves product weight, volume, and calculates real-time sales velocity from the database.

productId.description: The ID of the product, e.g., 'K15VC'.

function.name: findOptimalBin
function.description: Finds the best physical bin in the warehouse based on weight, volume, and sales velocity.
